iotsitewise.dashboard.DashboardDefinitio.Docs: The dashboard definition specified in a JSON literal. For detailed information, see [Creating dashboards (CLI)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/create-dashboards-using-aws-cli.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.

iotsitewise.dashboard.DashboardName.Docs: A friendly name for the dashboard.

iotsitewise.dashboard.ProjectId.Docs: The ID of the project in which to create the dashboard.

iotsitewise.dashboard.Tags.Docs: A list of key-value pairs that contain metadata for the dashboard. For more information, see [Tagging your AWS IoT SiteWise resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.
